sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69995" key="nebrido/peplos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεβρῐδό-πεπλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n69995.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">clad in fawnskin,</tr_> of Dionysus and the Bacchae, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.524.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
